mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, created_date, last_modified_date FROM sample_mybatis_item ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sample_mybatis_item (name, description, created_date, last_modified_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE sample_mybatis_item SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, last_modified_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
